core_skills.notes: Primary function — owns CRO strategy and execution across digital properties
Designs and runs structured A/B testing programs with statistical rigor
Analyzes and optimizes user journeys from acquisition through activation and conversion
Data interpretation, hypothesis development, and evidence-based decision making
Manages chatbots, pop-ups, overlays, product tours, and personalization engines

secondary_skills.notes: Works cross-functionally with SEO, lifecycle, product, and regional marketing teams
Coordinates experiments and initiatives across multiple teams and markets
Communicates experiment results, growth insights, and strategic recommendations
Prioritizes experimentation roadmap and balances speed, quality, and impact

differentiator_skills.notes: Leveraging AI tools for content generation, experimentation acceleration, and funnel optimization — increasingly expected
Understanding what makes landing pages and engagement experiences convert — creative judgment applied to CRO
Connecting experiment results to downstream funnel metrics and business outcomes

core_skills.notes: Primary channel — Meta Ads is the most common core requirement, TikTok and LinkedIn increasingly expected
Google Ads (Search, UAC, Display) is the second core platform across nearly all listings
Attribution, tracking, and analytics infrastructure — GA4, MMPs, pixels, dashboards
Budget ownership, media plan development, spend allocation across channels
Data analysis, performance interpretation, and optimization decision-making

secondary_skills.notes: Briefing creatives, testing ad variants, and scaling winning creative concepts
Structured A/B testing of creatives, audiences, bidding strategies, and landing pages
Managing ad networks, DSPs, SDK networks, and platform partner relationships
Collaborates with creative, product, BI, and monetization teams
Reporting to leadership, presenting performance insights, working with partners

differentiator_skills.notes: AI tools for creative generation, bid optimization, and campaign management — rapidly becoming standard
Understanding full funnel from click to conversion to LTV — connects campaign metrics to business outcomes
Building scalable performance systems and frameworks, not just optimizing individual campaigns
